title: Advanced Amethyst
description: Advanced Amethyst is a mod that allow you to make the full set of amethyst included paxel, hammer and excavator. The amethyst set is above diamond and below netherite
body:
# ![Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e45c2d654fbb62c7d2597fc31c42ab6ab843d9.png) Advanced Amethyst ![Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e45c2d654fbb62c7d2597fc31c42ab6ab843d9.png)

Advanced Amethyst is a mod that allow you to make the full set of amethyst included paxel, hammer and excavator. The amethyst set is above diamond and below netherite, its and intermediate step between those two.

You can also make the netherite tools with amethyst ones

## ![Amethyst Armor Tools And Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8a411522eac7a2cfe387dd38609fd643f4f84d8.gif) Amethyst Armor, Tools And Weapons Stats:
